creator: treif@mayn.de
text:
Update gkrellmmailwatch from 0.2 to 0.4.

Fix: --------------BA1D047AF0FEAC844B6DFA45
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii;
 name="port_gkrellmmailwatch.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: inline;
 filename="port_gkrellmmailwatch.diff"



--------------BA1D047AF0FEAC844B6DFA45----ED3qUODg9hvLEsh0CPcejRG3vCzmykWIgquSLM2Kx5TYctgj
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -u -rN gkrellmmailwatch.old/Makefile gkrellmmailwatch/Makefile
--- gkrellmmailwatch.old/Makefile	Mon Mar 12 23:47:18 2001
+++ gkrellmmailwatch/Makefile	Tue Mar 13 00:04:05 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	gkrellmmailwatch
-PORTVERSION=	0.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.4
 CATEGORIES=	mail
 MASTER_SITES=	http://gkrellm.luon.net/files/
 DISTNAME=	mailwatch-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -15,8 +15,6 @@
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${X11BASE}/include/gkrellm/gkrellm.h:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/gkrellm
 RUN_DEPENDS=	gkrellm:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/gkrellm
-
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/mailwatch
 
 USE_X_PREFIX=	yes
 USE_IMLIB=	yes
diff -u -rN gkrellmmailwatch.old/distinfo gkrellmmailwatch/distinfo
--- gkrellmmailwatch.old/distinfo	Mon Mar 12 23:47:18 2001
+++ gkrellmmailwatch/distinfo	Mon Mar 12 23:48:37 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (mailwatch-0.2.tar.gz) = bec6b0b305c27e7ee10e6f9bda416c59
+MD5 (mailwatch-0.4.tar.gz) = b43dd6c887f993b460e77f6c02420944
diff -u -rN gkrellmmailwatch.old/files/patch-aa gkrellmmailwatch/files/patch-aa
--- gkrellmmailwatch.old/files/patch-aa	Mon Mar 12 23:47:18 2001
+++ gkrellmmailwatch/files/patch-aa	Tue Mar 13 00:19:09 2001
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
---- Makefile.orig	Tue Sep  5 16:30:33 2000
-+++ Makefile	Tue Sep  5 16:26:44 2000
+--- Makefile.orig	Mon Sep 18 21:40:13 2000
++++ Makefile	Tue Mar 13 00:18:02 2001
 @@ -1,32 +1,30 @@
  # Makefile for the GKrellM mailwatch plugin
  
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@
  LIBS = $(GTK_LIB) $(IMLIB_LIB)
 -LFLAGS = -shared -lpthread
 -
--CC = gcc -g $(CFLAGS) $(FLAGS)
+-CC = gcc $(CFLAGS) $(FLAGS)
 +LFLAGS = -shared -pthread
  
  OBJS = mailwatch.o
diff -u -rN gkrellmmailwatch.old/files/patch-ab gkrellmmailwatch/files/patch-ab
--- gkrellmmailwatch.old/files/patch-ab	Mon Mar 12 23:47:18 2001
+++ gkrellmmailwatch/files/patch-ab	Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
@@ -1,18 +0,0 @@
---- mailwatch.c.orig	Wed Aug 23 02:09:36 2000
-+++ mailwatch.c	Wed Aug 23 02:12:48 2000
-@@ -403,13 +403,14 @@
-     }
-   else {
-     for (i=ctabs; i ; i = i->next) 
--      if (i->is_modified != DELETED)
-+      if (i->is_modified != DELETED) {
-         if (!strcmp(i->name,buf[0]) && i->is_modified != DELETED) {
-            gkrellm_message_window("Gkrellm mailwatch Error",
-                "a mailpanel with that name already exits",NULL);
-            return;
-            }
-         else pos++;
-+      }
-         
-     new = create_configtab(ctabs->tabs,buf[0],256,pos);
-     new->is_modified = NEW;
